title: Tutorial screen to Onboarding screen
scenario: Verify that navigating from Tutorial to Onboarding screen displays the correct start page with proper image and text matching Figma design.
steps: Open the app and navigate to the Tutorial screen.
From the Tutorial screen, navigate to the Onboarding screen.
Check that the start Onboarding page is displayed.
Verify that the image on the page matches the Figma design.
Verify that the text on the page matches the Figma design.
expected: The correct start Onboarding page is displayed with proper image and text, matching the Figma design.
